name: @codeflow/protocol
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — 5 schemas (Agent/Task/Review/Session/Skill) + ajv validator. Sprint S1 of design doc §10.2. v0.1.0-alpha.2 (P4 sprint Day 5): types.ts header carries the Charter 5.4 schema ownership matrix — 4 schemas are CodeFlow-owned application-layer emergence; Review is a dual contract (fcop-first + yaml-fallback). No schema JSON files changed; consumers can rely on v0.1.0-alpha.1 field shapes. See `fcop/internal/p4-day5-schema-drift.md` for the full ownership analysis.

scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:agent && npm run validate:task && npm run validate:review && npm run validate:session && npm run validate:skill
scripts.test:invalid: tsx src/cli.ts agent fixtures/agent/invalid-missing-layer.json --expect-fail && tsx src/cli.ts task fixtures/task/invalid-bad-status.md --expect-fail && tsx src/cli.ts skill fixtures/skill/invalid-no-fcop-kernel.json --expect-fail
scripts.test: npm run validate:all && npm run test:invalid
